conditions.critical_condition_basis: co-instantaneous elution of all standards at the same retention time
conditions.evidence_text: Using a mixture of 15.7/ 84.3 (A/B, v/v) "critical" separation conditions were realized. The ESI-TOF mass spectra recorded at 10.5, 10.9, and 11.5 min (Figure 2, upper middle) did not show any change of the maximum of the mass peak distribution.
conditions.notes: Mobile phase A is water with 0.1% formic acid; Mobile phase B is acetonitrile/methanol 30:70 (v/v). Determined using ethoxylated fatty acid C18 alcohol (Mw 700 g/mol).
conditions.physical_address: BAM, Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing, Richard-Willstaetter-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany

conditions.critical_condition_basis: co-instantaneous elution of all standards at the same retention time
conditions.evidence_text: At a solvent composition of 85:15 THF/water (v/v), which represents the "critical" mode of separation of PPO (middle), the PPO/PEO copolymer was injected.
conditions.notes: Mobile phase A is water with 0.2% formic acid; Mobile phase B is tetrahydrofuran. Determined using PPO homopolymer (Mp 1020 g/mol).
conditions.physical_address: BAM, Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing, Richard-Willstaetter-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany

conditions.critical_condition_basis: application of critical conditions determined for PEO
conditions.evidence_text: These "critical" conditions were applied for a separation of a mixture of 8 fatty acid ethoxylated alcohols. As presented in Figure 3 (left) the mixture could be separated in 10 min...
conditions.notes: Separation based on end-group structure (fatty acid chain length) under PEO critical conditions.
conditions.physical_address: BAM, Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing, Richard-Willstaetter-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany

conditions.critical_condition_basis: application of critical conditions determined for PPO
conditions.evidence_text: At a solvent composition of 85:15 THF/water (v/v), which represents the "critical" mode of separation of PPO (middle), the PPO/PEO copolymer was injected.
conditions.notes: Separation based on PEO block length/composition under PPO critical conditions.
conditions.physical_address: BAM, Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing, Richard-Willstaetter-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany
